title: chrysocephalum puteale
intro: Chrysocephalum puteale, also known as Yellow Buttons, is a flowering plant native to Australia. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor cuts. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum puteale include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from pain and itching. Chrysocephalum puteale can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for its active compounds to be extracted and utilized effectively.
